# Sharp Sighted Media

> Real estate media for top-producing agents in the Dallas–Fort Worth "121 corridor": MLS photography, drone/aerial, floor plans, twilight, cinematic video walkthroughs, and Zillow 3D tours — delivered within 24 hours.

Sharp Sighted Media is the real estate branch of Sharp Sighted Studio (founded 2022 by Dean Draper), based in North Texas. FAA Part 107 certified. Shoot days are Wednesday and Thursday. Every shoot is delivered within 24 hours.

- Phone: (214) 233-5338
- Email: dean@sharpsightedstudio.com
- Service area: Allen, Plano, Frisco, McKinney, Lewisville, The Colony, Coppell, Roanoke, Denton, Grapevine, Southlake, Colleyville, and Westlake, TX (Collin, Denton, and Tarrant counties)

## Packages
- The Essentials Package — $400/property: MLS-optimized stills, aerial photography, a measured floor plan, a twilight hero edit, a 20-second vertical reel, and a branded property website. 24-hour turnaround.
- The Zillow Package — $550: Essentials plus a Zillow 3D interactive tour and interactive floor plan (makes a listing Zillow-Showcase-eligible).
- The Premium Package — $1,000: Essentials plus a cinematic video walkthrough and a cinematic aerial film.

## À la carte add-ons
Zillow 3D Interactive $175 · Cinematic Walkthrough $500 · Agent or Pro Voiceover +$150 · Cinematic Aerial / MasterShots $250 · Neighborhood B-roll $100 · Additional Social Reel $150 · Virtual Staging $18/image · Signature Edit $85 · Real Twilight Session $175 · Large Home +$100 per 1,000 sq ft over 4,000.

## Key pages
- Home: https://sharpsighted.media/
- Packages & pricing: https://sharpsighted.media/packages
- Portfolio: https://sharpsighted.media/real-estate-photos

## The brand
Sharp Sighted Media is one branch of Sharp Sighted Studio (https://sharpsightedstudio.com), alongside Sharp Sighted Photos (portraits and headshots) and Sharp Sighted Studio (creative community and education). Tagline: Stay Sharp. Stay Seen. Stay Human.
